name: || Your Machine Harem! ||
description:
UPDATE: V1, V2, PATHFINDER, & SPECTRE HAVE BEEN CHANGED TO BE FULLY MALE!!

ENJOY YOUR FAT-ASSED ROBOT BOYS YOU ULTRAQUEERS

Your own harem of 7 different robots, androids, and machines! The list of said characters are - V1 (Ultrakill) - V2 (Ultrakill) - V3 (Fanmade Ultrakill character) - Haydee - Misha (Fanmade Halo character) - Pathfinder (Apex Legends) - Spectre (Titanfall 2)
creator: XXXCVTH
